firmware.title: HD1925_11_F.04 is available
firmware.description:
New version: HD1925_11_F.04

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

•Upgraded to Android12 OS

•Android security patch updated to 2022-12-05

•General bug fixes and improvements

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting March 26, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.title: HD1925_11_F.05 is available
firmware.description:
New version: HD1925_11_F.05

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• General bugs fix.

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2AM and 6AM starting on September 20th, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
